backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (theme redesign, hero section, about section, phonics program, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and contents, serving as a reference index for the Akshar Learning Hub frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Akshar Learning Hub app, loading Nunito and Poppins Google Fonts and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up section refs for smooth-scroll navigation and renders all page sections (Hero, About, ProgramOverview, PhonicsActivitiesDemo, LearningStrategies, Testimonials, Contact) within a Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/assets/generatedImages.ts: Exports a typed constant mapping named image keys to their generated asset file paths, covering both new Akshar Learning Hub assets and legacy assets.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Scroll-triggered About section component displaying Akshar Learning Hub's mission, an illustrated image with a floating stat badge, and three highlight cards covering curriculum, multi-sensory learning, and parent partnership.
frontend/src/components/activities/Activ: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a shared layout wrapper for activity components.
frontend/src/components/activities/Lette: Displays an interactive alphabet grid where clicking a letter plays its phonics sound and shows an example word with emoji, using an IntersectionObserver-style active state and animation.
frontend/src/components/activities/Pronu: Renders a grid of WordCard components drawn from easy and medium word lists, allowing users to hear phonics-based word pronunciations with a tip about blending sounds.
frontend/src/components/activities/Sound: Implements a multiple-choice phonics quiz game using soundGames data, tracking score and progress, playing letter sounds, and showing a results screen with replay option on completion.
frontend/src/components/activities/WordB: Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for a word-building activity component.
frontend/src/components/activities/WordC: A card component displaying a word with its emoji and a button that plays the word's audio using the audioHelper utility, with a playing state animation.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated inquiry form (name, email, phone, child age, message) and a contact info panel showing address, phone, email, and social media links, styled with a blue-green gradient background.
frontend/src/components/Features.tsx: Placeholder or features section component file with no visible content provided in the snippet.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social media links, quick navigation links, and contact details. Uses a dark gradient background and accepts an `onNavigate` callback for section routing.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky responsive header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation links, and an 'Enroll Now' CTA button. Handles scroll-based styling and mobile menu toggle state.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section displaying the main headline, description, stats, and CTA buttons for Akshar Learning Hub. Includes entrance animation, decorative blobs, and a program image.
frontend/src/components/Illustration.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/LearningStrategi: Section showcasing phonics learning strategies (e.g., phonemic awareness, multi-sensory learning) and teaching methods (gamification, spaced repetition) using animated cards revealed on scroll.
frontend/src/components/PhonicsActivitie: Interactive section with three tabbed phonics activities—Letter Sound Matching, Pronunciation Practice, and a Sound Recognition quiz game—allowing users to try the program for free.
Displays the 8-month phonics program broken into three phases (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced), each listing skills taught and materials provided, with scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials section with a carousel of 6 parent reviews, showing 3 at a time on desktop with prev/next navigation and an intersection-observer-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/data/soundGames.ts: Defines the SoundGameQuestion interface and exports an array of 6 multiple-choice phonics questions, each identifying which word starts with a given letter sound.
frontend/src/data/wordLists.ts: Exports two categorized word lists (easy 3-letter and medium 4-letter words), each entry containing the word, its individual letters array, and an emoji.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for future React Query hooks; currently exports nothing as no backend operations are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a blue-green color theme (light and dark modes), and keyframe animations (fadeIn, slideUp, float).
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that renders the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/audioHelper.ts: Provides Web Speech API utilities for playing phonics-based letter sounds, example words, and word pronunciations, with a phonics map and letter-to-emoji/word lookup table.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, font families (Nunito/Poppins), and animation keyframes; includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking version, architectural notes, existing features, and image requirements for the Akshar Learning Hub educational website with a blue-green Pixar-style theme.
